points.name: Hole 8 Rear Crossing
points.notes: Crossing reference only. The Hole 8 cart path itself is not approved for spectator routing.

routes.name: Practice Green Junction to Accessible Restrooms
Hole 1/15 Crossing to Restrooms and First Aid
Hole 8 Rear Crossing to Hole 9 Tee Crossing
routes.notes: Approved spectator connection between the rear of Hole 8 and the Hole 9 tee crossing. The Hole 8 cart path itself is intentionally excluded.

routes.name: Hole 18 / Clubhouse Network Connector
routes.notes: Connects the Hole 18 path to the clubhouse loop using the recorded Heroes Outpost reference.

routes.name: Hole 1 / Hole 2 Crossing Connector
routes.notes: Connects the Hole 1/15 crossing to the Hole 2 street crossing using recorded crossing points.

routes.name: Holes 5 / 13 Junction Connector
routes.notes: Closes the short gap at the recorded Holes 5/13 junction.

routes.name: Hole 9 Turn Connector
routes.notes: Connects Hole 9 green through the recorded turn amenities to the Hole 10 path.

routes.name: Hole 10 / Hole 11 Connector
routes.notes: Closes the recorded gap at the Hole 10/11 street crossing.

routes.name: Hole 11 / Hole 12 Connector
routes.notes: Connects the Hole 11 path to the Hole 12 tee reference.

routes.name: Hole 12 / Hole 13 Connector
routes.notes: Connects the Holes 5/12/13 junction to the Hole 13 path.

routes.name: Hole 13 / Hole 14 Connector
routes.notes: Connects the Hole 13/14 crossing to the Hole 14 tee path.

routes.name: Hole 9 Bypass Return Connector
routes.notes: Connects the bypass endpoint back to the recorded spectator path. It does not add the Hole 8 cart path.

dataNotes: Restroom and accessible-restroom markers use the same R icon; accessibility remains in the popup.
Hole reference markers are hidden by default and can be enabled with filters.
Volunteer-only and player-only locations were retained in the cleaned backup but omitted from the public dataset.
The Hole 8 cart path was intentionally not added because it was identified as unavailable to spectators.
Short high-confidence gaps were connected using scouted endpoints and recorded junction/destination points.
Generated connector paths should be treated as approximate and tournament signs and staff always control.

officialOverlay.method: piecewise affine rubber-sheet using confirmed GPS tee/green anchors
officialOverlay.disclaimer: Official illustrated overlay is approximate and visually simplified. GPS points and the spectator path network control navigation.
